entries.title: Site goes live at ebrady25.github.io/birdie-buddy-live
entries.summary: First-time-live push. 10 pages, 14 JSON data sources, shared component system, jsdom-verified. Every future change from this point forward will be logged here.

entries.title: Landing page hero: measured-accuracy framing
entries.summary: Replaced rotating live-edge line with a single durable promise: 'One model. Forty-seven weeks of measured accuracy.' Proof callout cites Week 11 Spearman 0.344. No comparisons, no claims we can't back with data already on the site.

entries.title: Performance page: Weekly Recaps section
entries.summary: New expandable cards between the Spearman chart and Shadow Variants. Week 11 RBC Heritage seeded with an honest head-to-head recap — BBI 0.344 vs DG 0.377, Fitzpatrick #3/#4, what we got right, what we missed.

entries.title: Shadow variant v8.7-cfgate added to the A/B slate
entries.summary: Course-fit lifted (+0.02) and a new gating rule caps the SG multiplier at 1.05x for players with fewer than 4 starts at a venue. Targets the Aberg-style Masters over-ranking without punishing true specialists. Runs in shadow only — zero production risk.

entries.title: Public changelog launched
entries.summary: You're reading it. From now on, every shipped change to BirdieBuddy is logged here, reverse chronologically, with a category badge.

entries.title: Methodology page: plain-English Brier explainer
entries.summary: Rewrote the Brier score section for golf fans without a stats background. Added a concrete 10%-win example and tightened the surrounding math block. Performance numbers unchanged.

entries.title: Methodology page: typography + hierarchy pass
entries.summary: Refined heading scale, vertical rhythm, and section breaks using design-system tokens only. Cleaner read, no copy changes.

entries.title: Landing page: typography + agent grid polish
entries.summary: Section padding lifted, agent grid cards given crisper borders and clearer Sonnet/Opus differentiation.

entries.title: Site data synced with latest tracker state
entries.summary: Week 11 RBC Heritage results (BBI 0.3437 vs 0.3770 Spearman) and Week 12 Zurich Classic deferral now reflected in the site's data layer.

entries.title: 10-page site verified (0 JS errors)
entries.summary: New jsdom harness confirms all 10 pages parse cleanly and every data path resolves. Gates every future site edit.

entries.title: Orchestrator era begins
entries.summary: New operating model: 10+ improvements shipped per day across model, site, content, and infrastructure. Every public change gets a receipt here.
